summary: The diff implements REQ-1 comprehensively. A dedicated download page (DownloadAppPage.tsx) was added at the /download route with Android and iOS download buttons using platform icons (SiAndroid, Apple), the page uses the existing dark theme (bg-yt-bg, mt-magenta/mt-purple brand colors), the layout is responsive with flex-col/sm:flex-row patterns, and a 'Download App' link with a Smartphone icon was added to the sidebar navigation in Layout.tsx. The required banner image (download-banner.dim_1200x400.png) is referenced. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: App screenshots section displaying multiple app screenshots from device-specific image assets
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requested download buttons for platforms and a visually appealing layout. The inclusion of specific app screenshot images (App-1.jpeg, App.jpeg, Screenshot_2026-02-25-*.jpg, etc.) was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: i18n/translations added for download page strings across multiple languages
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request internationalization or translation support for the download page. Translation keys like downloadApp, downloadAppTitle, downloadForAndroid, downloadForIOS, etc. were added to translations.ts without being requested.
